channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin likely to fall another 30% to $44,000 by year-end, prominent BTC miner says
item.description: An early miner says Strategy's stock mNAV has fallen to 0.72, near the level that marked the last cycle's turn, and that bitcoin historically bottoms about six months after that signal.

item.title: Bitcoin Plummets Lower as Strategy's STRC Dives Further From $100 Mark
item.description: The price of Bitcoin rapidly fell to nearly $58,000 after Strategy's STRC preferred shares notched a new low and MSTR fell alongside.

item.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
item.description: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of around $7 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

item.title: OKX began building its presence in Europe in 2018. Over the past eight years, we have worked closely with regulators and the broader crypto community, operating with integrity and a customer-first philosophy. As a technology company evolving into a regulat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE03X1laWVF1cWJtSldGMnJSVUxZNzVxOW4zOG1IYkl1b2IwQXZoajhGLUh2NEk3anRKS3lUTlRBSEJWUFo2bmpkNWM4Smd6TVB3ZVN0c0NPU2R0bUFJZ1E?oc=5" target="_blank">OKX began building its presence in Euro…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 10.1% as index rises
item.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 5.8% from Wednesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

item.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
item.description: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

item.title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
item.description: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

item.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
item.description: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

item.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
item.description: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

item.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
item.description: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

item.title: $47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
item.description: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

item.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
item.description: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

item.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
item.description: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.

item.title: Morning Minute: Strategy’s MSTR and STRC Crash to 52-Week Lows
item.description: A massive Micron earnings beat has lifted global markets, pushing crypto higher after yesterday's nasty sell off took BTC sub-$60k.

item.title: Circle, Nomura eye Japan corporate FX with stablecoin settlement: Report
item.description: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.

item.title: Bitcoin derivatives signal panic. A weak core PCE reading could trigger snapback.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 25, 2026

item.title: CoinEx denies claims it served as $3.84 billion gateway to sanctioned Iranian crypto firms
item.description: Blockchain analysts TRM Labs says CoinEx facilitated more than $3.8 billion in blockchain-traced flows with sanctioned Iranian crypto entities. CoinEx disputes the findings.

item.title: Crypto relief rally fails to shake persistent bearish derivatives signal
item.description: A relief rally tied to recovering U.S. equities lifted BTC and ETH off weekly lows, but bearish derivatives positioning and negative CVD suggest the rebound may be fragile.

item.title: Kalshi Seeks $40B Valuation Weeks After $1B Raise: FT
item.description: The prediction market seeks a valuation near double the $22 billion it hit last month, as a federal-state fight over regulation escalates.

item.title: Bitcoin supply in loss reaches record high 10.83 million BTC
item.description: Almost 11 million bitcoin are now held at a loss, while long-term holders control a record 14.8 million coins.

item.title: Micron delivers blowout earnings, surges 16% and deals crypto bulls a blow
item.description: Micron Technology surged after blockbuster earnings and strong guidance, lifting AI memory stocks.

item.title: Bitcoin will likely bottom BELOW Realized Price (~$53k), just like it did in EVERY previous bear market. Right now the grey Realized Price line has been glued to the black 200-week Geometric MA line since 2023. What do you think: new low incoming or differ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5LdmszOHRZV1JFSGpwU3NicWlwSmc5OHFVdDNmRllaR0VJSTNQd3FrQjVZQjhIV0RJM2Q0LV96eG9LeEdqTTEtN1Y2UFhZcllqSmxjS3RpWFNoWGxHVEpLZEtVUkpyZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin will likely bottom B…

item.title: Iran-linked entities moved $3.8B through CoinEx, TRM says
item.description: TRM Labs traced $3.8 billion moved by 60 sanctioned Iranian entities through CoinEx and said that the exchange’s 8% share of illicit transactions was substantially higher than its counterparts.

item.title: Indonesia sets certification rules for influencers recommending crypto
item.description: Indonesia’s financial regulator will require influencers recommending crypto and other digital assets to hold relevant certifications as regulators worldwide tighten oversight of finfluencers.

item.title: Polish crypto exchange Kanga secures MiCA license in Latvia
item.description: Poland-founded crypto exchange Kanga has secured a Class 3 MiCA license in Latvia, enabling EU-wide crypto services as Polish lawmakers debate framework's implementation.

item.title: According to SoSoValue data, on June 24 (Eastern Time), Bitcoin spot ETFs recorded a total net outflow of USD 469 million, while Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC saw the largest single-day net inflow at USD 23.5642 million. Ethereum spot ETFs recorde - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBLMHB4ZnB4U0dtYXU1Ukp0LWJfMVJUZVFyX0xabHpjZFh2dnEzUGlac2VJYVRHZTd6X1NKZEpvZDZDV0RPX3E5N0NxV1ZkV09uZjVSaWhOWVlieUljNVJUeEhJZw?oc=5" target="_blank">According to SoSoValue data, on …

item.title: Forget max pain theory. Bitcoin is well below the $72,000 magnet going into $10 billion options expiry
item.description: The popular max pain theory isn’t working out as bitcoin trades far from the $72K level a day ahead of a $10 billion quarterly options settlement.

item.title: Fast sweep of the lows on #Bitcoin and a quick move upwards. The weekly hasn't closed yet, but if the weekly can close above the 200-Week MA, we're in great territory for more upside. Ultimately; don't sell your #Bitcoin to buy it back lower. Just simply hold wo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBqLUQtMUg3U0lCS2tjaGFfOE9ZLUVVZmJ1VDFVLS12N3IxX3BnTEwwc0RpSWRUSHd6Vk1hQUlMdVk2ek10T25vdGx2YVp4RWt0UU5UY2tDMzEzV3Z6dlVYNUVvZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Fast sweep of the lows on #Bitco…

item.title: US arbitration giant rolls out ‘legal layer’ for agentic commerce
item.description: As agentic AI transactions increase, “we need to know there’s a clear answer to what happens if something goes wrong,” said Mance Harmon, co-founder of Hedera.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin plunges under $59,000 as early bounce fades
item.description: A liquidation flush took bitcoin to its lowest since early June before Micron's blowout earnings and SK Hynix's U.S. listing plans steadied the AI trade that crypto had been sliding alongside.

item.title: House Democrats seek SEC answers on AI investment advisers
item.description: House Democrats have questioned the SEC over trading platforms offering AI agent advisers making “consequential investment decisions on behalf of retail investors.”

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Around $10B in Bitcoin options are set to expire on Deribit this Friday, potentially compounding more pressure on an already struggling market. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBmQkpBOTIyMWpUU3g1T0xneHlPNDNsWHpZODF6TjBXcXNiWUF6VGxWYXM5MHhRQjA0M183MXl1WVZ4b3pmTEV2T1VnSzVHUzE3OVhOQndZYzhiZGh3MEdLWlFvNEE?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Around $10B in Bitcoi…

item.title: MemeCore's M token suddenly crashes 80% with no clear trigger
item.description: The token fell from nearly $3 to about $0.50 in hours, wiping out close to $3 billion in market value, with no exploit or announcement to explain it. Onchain investigator ZachXBT warned in April that M's price had been propped up by inside…

item.title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin goes live in Japan after regulatory approval
item.description: Japan's financial regulator cleared the U.S. dollar-backed token as a new category of payment instrument, letting SBI VC Trade offer it to institutions and retail. RLUSD remains small, at about $1.7 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin has a new line in the sand. Thursday’s core PCE could stress test it.
item.description: The market has found a new support level and it could be tested following Thursday's U.S. inflation data.

item.title: XRP slides 2.8% as weak bounce keeps $1 support in focus
item.description: Sellers broke another support level on heavy volume, while the recovery failed to reclaim the zone that would ease downside pressure.

item.title: Bitcoin back above $60,000, ETH, SOL recoup losses as AI stocks stage rebound
item.description: The token fell to about $59,000 before buyers stepped in, but the week's losses are steep across the board. A blowout Micron forecast lifted stocks and oil kept sliding, yet crypto did not follow.

item.title: One of China’s Best-Known Bitcoin Miners Sees BTC Bear-Market Bottom at $42,000-$44,000 in Late 2026 Jiang Zhuoer, one of China’s best-known Bitcoin miners, predicted that the current BTC bear market may bottom between October and December 2026 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBVSlVlRldVa0psTzVGZ1JHN2p4SF95aWtDajRpVEtHcEQ3UFhTdHcxNURiVmpVdE9ISFVYQ1N2MkJnZ2lvSzZiWVFlNlBjRFh0RXRHNTlCTjJoS1lSM2d0Tlc2RQ?oc=5" target="_blank">One of China’s Best-Known Bitcoi…

item.title: Abracadabra takes emergency action as MIM stablecoin depeg worsens
item.description: The protocol is raising interest rates across all Cauldrons to encourage debt repayment and reduce supply.

item.title: Kalshi seeks funding at $40B valuation, nearly doubling last raise: FT
item.description: Kalshi is reportedly in talks to raise new capital at a $40 billion valuation, reflecting growing investor confidence in regulated prediction markets.

item.title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
item.description: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.

item.title: HYPE down 22% from record highs: Will spot demand revive the uptrend?
item.description: HYPE price drops near a key support zone where fading selling pressure collides with shrinking futures market activity. Will the altcoin resume its uptrend above $60?

item.title: JUST IN: Grayscale says Bitcoin appears attractively priced at current levels 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5HbGE1UERjWVJVOUVfQW0zcmhNdXVNM0pmQzVxVVE5c29EeHhaZm14RURwZHVwSzBjN1FkN1AzbVJBdVgwcUZuOE5HSFVQd2FzUk5vMmJWNDNTQnk3SVJpNGpCcUNTbjA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Grayscale says Bit…

item.title: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
item.description: Illinois is set to institute a new tax on prediction markets next week that would take 15% of gross receipts from sports-related wagers.

item.title: FTX exec’s wife scheduled for November trial on campaign finance charges
item.description: A Manhattan judge ordered that Michelle Bond’s criminal trial start in November after he denied a motion to dismiss the indictment based on claims that prosecutors misled her husband over her charges.

item.title: The Next GameStop? Meme Stock Traders Make Biggie-Size Bet on Wendy's
item.description: Shares in fast-food chain Wendy's might be the next hot meme stock for retail investors hungry for a cause.

item.title: Bitcoin nearly loses $59K as DXY surges: Are traders bracing for more pain?
item.description: Bitcoin drops toward new 2026 lows as spot BTC ETF outflows and slowing accumulation from Strategy weigh on market sentiment.

item.title: 'Painful' Bitcoin Sell-Off Drags Ethereum, XRP and Dogecoin Lower as Crypto Stocks Dive
item.description: Bitcoin's slide to its lowest point in 21 months slammed the price of leading altcoins, while pressuring crypto stocks on Wall Street.

item.title: Your Hermes Agent Now Has a Pet. It Does Nothing—And That’s the Point
item.description: Nous Research added animated mascot sprites to the self-improving AI agent—and the only thing they do is look cute while your AI works.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US House Chairman French Hill tells FOX the Clarity Act has bipartisan support to pass the legislation. 👀 Clarity is almost here 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1za3ZMTVhWYk10OEZsRjY5NE55Q3V5RXZfNXk5T053eWlUY0dTd0NnbjBqa1NhVHFGQS1kazR2UlE4VE01SjJkS2o5VG9GZ185RHZiSy1TVjRVNlFFNVNicnk2VHkwbFE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US House Chai…

item.title: Upheaval at the Ethereum Foundation has some of crypto’s biggest names feeling bullish
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at Ethereum's eventful week that started off with the launch of EthLabs, plus the layoffs at the Ethereum Foundation, and what this all means for the network.

item.title: Kalshi targets a massive $40 billion valuation, widening lead over rival Polymarket
item.description: The prediction market operator, which is eyeing a potential public debut in 2027, could close a new funding round in Q3, according to a Financial Times report.

item.title: "Crypto" is going to zero. Bitcoin is going to 1M+. I've been working on Bitcoin since early 2013 when it was ~$50. First it was going to zero because of Silk Road. Then Mt. Gox. Then governments were going to ban it. Then it was slow technology and it was goi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9yYlBzMGxqZkE0N3dCSExERUE3U0E5QjFhVnQyYlhEdFI4WDVzOUVuN1VFMm5OLWpkbFc4RnB2Ql9qdGJxVmZJdzAyZlFEVTRJSDc3NUlLS19HV2JXLUpLTVpB?oc=5" target="_blank">"Crypto" is going to zero. Bitcoin…

item.title: Kalshi sues Illinois officials over prediction markets restrictions
item.description: The prediction markets company claimed that it would be “irreparably harmed” when an Illinois law signed as part of a budget package goes in effect on July 1.

item.title: Leaked Code Suggests Anthropic Is Preparing to Bring Fable 5 Back
item.description: A leaker found new strings inside Claude Code that hint at weekly Fable 5 usage built into subscription plans, not sold separately as before.

item.title: Researcher Throws Cold Water on Microsoft Quantum Claims
item.description: A physicist's formal critique argues Microsoft has not demonstrated the topological qubit behind its Majorana 2 quantum chip.

item.title: 'Stop Buying Bitcoin': Strategy Needs More Cash Fast, Analyst Says as STRC Hits New Low
item.description: STRC fell even lower Wednesday while MSTR bleeds. CryptoQuant says that Strategy needs to stop buying Bitcoin and start stacking cash.

item.title: Luxembourg has established itself as the EU’s leading hub for institutional crypto and tokenization. The country has long taken a thoughtful, innovation-oriented approach to blockchain technology and to digital assets. That is why we are delighted to have chos - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBBM1REVW92aGF1ZXRrSmttbXZjdXFIVENJQXZqWGl5VERlbTRUZlR5WWtIS1NHWE53VmtsQ0ViT3ZLcVpveUtxcjV1b3drbzJ4cmpuaUt1cUhCd2ZxOTI2LVZfTXI?oc=5" target="_blank">Luxembourg has established itse…

item.title: Binance Withdraws MiCA License Application in Greece, Leaving EU Users in Limbo
item.description: Crypto exchange Binance formally withdrew its MiCA license application in Greece, one week after a report said it would be denied.
